Title: OpenClaw: Sender policy bypass in host media attachment reads allows unauthorized local file disclosure
Description: OpenClaw's outbound host-media attachment read helper could enable host-local file reads based on global or agent-level read access without also honoring sender and group-scoped tool policy. In channel deployments that used `toolsBySender` or group policy to deny `read` for less-trusted senders, a denied sender could still trigger host-media attachment loading and cause readable local files to be returned through the outbound media path.
NotImpacted: All versions before 2026.4.9, all versions starting from 2026.4.10
